Hey friends, need some help setting up my android game to login with the same account I use for my Steam version.

Steps I have followed:

1. Launched Steam game, went to User Center.
2. Created a Qookka account, now it was linked to my Steam game.
3. Also linked it with a Gmail account
4. Installed Morimens (Qookka Games) from Play Store
5. At login screen, I tried logging in via Qookka login, Gmail login, and Steam login.

I always get an error "This game has not been released in your region" and it doesn't let me login.

Any tips on how to make it work?
